$comment: PolyRig feature_list.json template — plan-as-state, governed by schemas/feature_list.schema.json. polyrig: fill every {{PLACEHOLDER}}; duplicate the example feature object once per planned feature; this $comment may stay in the final artifact (the schema allows a top-level $comment) but rewrite it as a usage note. STATE MACHINE: status moves planned -> in_progress -> (blocked) -> implemented -> verified, plus rejected; update after EVERY implementation attempt; never set 'verified' unless verification.automated commands passed or verification.manual checks are explicitly documented in notes. FIELDS: id = 'F' + 3 digits (F001, F002, ...); title = short human-readable feature title; status = one of planned|in_progress|blocked|implemented|verified|rejected (new features start as 'planned'); priority = p0 (must-have) | p1 | p2 (nice-to-have); depends_on = ids of features that must reach at least 'implemented' first; pack_refs = pack ids ('stack/<name>' or 'domain/<name>') whose copied knowledge under docs/stacks/ and docs/domains/ this feature draws on; acceptance_criteria = at least one concrete, checkable criterion; verification.manual = human checks, verification.automated = shell commands that must exit 0; files_expected = repo-relative paths expected to be created or modified; notes = free-form: blockers, manual-verification evidence, deviations (start empty).
